segments.text: Save me, O God, by Your name, And vindicate me by Your strength.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear my prayer, O God; Give ear to the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For strangers have risen up against me, And oppressors have sought after my life; They have not set God before them.
Behold, God is my helper; The Lord is with those who uphold my life.
He will repay my enemies for their evil. Cut them off in Your truth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will freely sacrifice to You; I will praise Your name, O Lord, for it is good.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For He has delivered me out of all trouble; And my eye has seen its desire upon my enemies.
